hero.description: Senior Full Stack Engineer (React, Vue, Node.js, Python, TypeScript)

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: A Passionate Full Stack Engineer
about.p1: Senior Full Stack Engineer with 8+ years of experience in designing, developing, and scaling high-performance web applications across diverse industires.
about.p2: Proven expertise in building modern frontend architectures using React and Vue combined with robust backend systems powered by Node.js and microservices.
about.p3: Strong track record of delivering scalable, secure, and maintainable solutions in agile, cross-functional environments.
about.p4: Experienced in leading full-cycle development from system design to production deployment with a focus on performance optimization and user experience.
about.p5: Passionate about leveraging cutting-edge technologies to drive business impact, engineering excellence, and product innovation.
about.experienceSubtitle: Experience gained throughout my professional career

systemArchitect.title: Scalable Systems Architect
systemArchitect.description: Experienced in designing and building scalable, high-performance systems using microservices architecture and modern cloud technologies. Adept at making architectural decisions that ensure long-term maintainability, reliability, and efficiency across complex applications.

engineer.title: Full Stack Product Engineer
engineer.description: Skilled in delivering end-to-end solutions, from intuitive frontend interfaces to robust backend systems. Focused on creating seamless, high-quality user experiences while ensuring strong integration between all layers of the application.

specialist.title: Performance Optimization Specialist
specialist.description: Passionate about improving application speed and efficiency through advanced optimization techniques such as code splitting, caching strategies, and efficient data handling, consistently delivering measurable performance gains.

realTimeAppDeveloper.title: Real-Time Application Developer
realTimeAppDeveloper.description: Proficient in building highly interactive, real-time systems using technologies like WebSockets and event-driven architecture, enabling dynamic user experiences and low-latency data synchronization.

advocate.title: Security & Reliability Advocate
advocate.description: Committed to implementing secure and reliable systems by integrating industry-standard authentication methods, including JWT and OAuth 2.0, while ensuring data integrity and system stability in production environments.

techLeader.title: Collaborative Technical Leader
techLeader.description: Experienced in leading development efforts, mentoring engineers, and collaborating across cross-functional teams to deliver impactful solutions aligned with business goals and engineering best practices.

Smile.title: Smile
Smile.desc: Led end-to-end development of scalable full stack applications, taking ownership of architectural design and key technical decisions while ensuring alignment with business objectives. Drove the delivery of high-performance, reliable solutions in production environments by applying best practices in system design, code quality, and performance optimization, while collaborating closely with cross-functional teams to maintain scalability, maintainability, and a seamless user experience.

Open.title: Open
Open.desc: Specialized in designing and building scalable backend systems and APIs, with a focus on delivering high-performance, reliable, and secure solutions for enterprise applications. Experienced in developing efficient and maintainable architectures that support system scalability and stability, while implementing best practices in performance optimization, data integrity, and security to ensure consistent and dependable application behavior.

91APP.title: 91APP
91APP.desc: Focused on building modern, responsive, and user-friendly frontend applications, with a strong emphasis on performance, usability, and accessibility. Dedicated to creating intuitive and visually cohesive interfaces that enhance user engagement while maintaining high standards of code quality, scalability, and maintainability. Committed to leveraging best practices, modern frameworks, and performance optimization techniques to deliver seamless, efficient, and reliable user experiences across a wide range of devices and environments.

education.p1: Completed a Bachelor's degree focused on computer science, software engineering, and information systems at National Taiwan University of Science and Technology. The program built a strong foundation in algorithms, system design, software development, and applied problem solving.
education.p2: This academic background strengthened both theoretical understanding and practical engineering skills, supporting work across frontend, backend, and full stack product development.
